Light Heavyweight

Light Heavyweight (191.0-210.0 lbs) fighter ranks

The rankings presented are computerized and provided by the FightMatrix ranking system, which utilizes a comprehensive MMA fight database to provide objective rankings. Please note, that these rankings ONLY contain fighters who have had at least one professional fight some time in the 450 days prior to the ranking date.

Issue Date: 5/10/2026 (Official Release: #1023)
Rating Formula:

8 thoughts on “Light Heavyweight”

  1. Long says:
    September 23, 2025 at 4:59 am

    Can you also allow the same filters to be used for the other rating methods as standard? The one that’s most important to me is “Next Fight In” so I can easily find the fighters in upcoming fights.

    Reply
    1. Oleg says:
      September 23, 2025 at 1:15 pm

      Thanks for your suggestions, we will take them into consideration when working on new features and enhancements.

      Reply
  2. Long says:
    September 23, 2025 at 3:58 am

    Is it possible to have dropdown box to show more items rather than only 25 at a time?

    Reply
  3. Cverna Alexandr says:
    July 21, 2025 at 4:50 am

    Mma

    Reply
  4. DerpyDagon says:
    August 6, 2024 at 6:32 pm

    Does “overrated compared to Elo” mean that the UFC ranks the fighter higher than they’re in Fightmatrix’s Elo system?

    Reply
    1. Jason says:
      August 7, 2024 at 2:10 pm

      It is comparing OUR standard system to the mathematical alternatives (Elo, Glicko, etc)

      Reply
  5. Alex says:
    March 12, 2024 at 11:56 am

    Where strong Russian fighters Vitaly and Sergey Shemetov

    Reply
    1. oleg says:
      March 12, 2024 at 4:39 pm

      https://www.fightmatrix.com/fighter-search/?fName=Shemetov

      Reply
